data.acceptance:
1. OpenCode can run claimed-step and take-loop sessions in interactive mode through the shared session runtime.
2. OpenCode turn completion and session completion are detected from explicit protocol signals and normalized into the shared event model.
3. Follow-up prompting, timeout/kill, retry, and abort behavior match the shared protocol rather than bespoke OpenCode logic.
4. Tests cover successful completion, hang timeout, and retry/abort behavior for interactive OpenCode sessions.
